sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Get precise positions of key objects
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Find the green frame in the right chamber (id=7) and the black center (id=9)
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'B', 'c']:
        # Get boundary to find center
        boundary = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
        cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
        center_r = sum(rows) // len(rows)
        center_c = sum(cols) // len(cols)
        print(f"id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={boundary} center≈({center_r},{center_c})")

# Also check the purple bar
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'p':
        boundary = n['boundary']
        print(f"Purple bar: boundary={boundary}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
